name: Peppernuts (Pfeffernussen)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the white and brown sugar with the shortening.
2. Beat in the eggs and vanilla.
3. Combine the raisins, coconut, and nuts, grinding them fine in a food processor or grinder. Add to the mixture above.
4. Sift the flour, baking soda, and salt together; add these, along with the buttermilk, to the mixture above.
5. Divide the dough into several parts; roll each part into a long, approximately 1-inch thick snake-like shape.
6. Cut the snakes at about half-inch intervals to form cookie shapes.
7. Arrange the nut-like cookies on an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 - 12 minutes, depending on whether you prefer softer or crunchier cookies.
